name: basic-diary-read
_doc: Minimal request — single read permission on diary, no clientData. Default scenario; checks the bare consent-dialog rendering.

name: basic-diary-manage
_doc: Single manage permission on diary. Same as basic-diary-read but level=manage to verify level-text rendering.

name: with-consent-md
_doc: Stress-test the markdown consent message: bold, italic, list, link. Renders via marked.parse in PermissionsDialog.tsx.

app-web-auth:description.content:
**Welcome!** This test app would like access to your *Diary*.

- Reads and writes diary entries.
- Used only for UI testing.
- See [healthdatasafe.org](https://www.healthdatasafe.org) for our policy.

name: with-consent-plaintext
_doc: clientData consent message in plain-text shape (type: 'note/txt'). The renderer must accept this as well as text/markdown — verifies type-agnostic rendering.

app-web-auth:description.content: This test app would like access to your Diary. No formatting; just plain text. Used only for UI testing — accept or reject as you like.

name: manage-all
_doc: Wildcard manage — surfaces the '* (all data)' rendering and the 'broad permission' affordance.

name: multi-permission
_doc: Six permissions: 2× each level (manage/contribute/read). Stress-tests the consent dialog's per-level icon rendering, list spacing, and scrolling on narrow viewports (popup mode is ~400 px).

name: with-return-url
_doc: Sets returnURL so closeOrRedirect path is exercised on accept (popup-less flow).

name: with-expire-after
_doc: Includes expireAfter so PermissionsDialog renders the 'Will expire after: …s' line.

name: lang-fr
_doc: languageCode=fr — checks copy + i18n surface (heading, button labels, error strings).

app-web-auth:description.content: **Bienvenue!** Cette application de test souhaite accéder à votre *Journal*.
